mosques.name: Muslim Society of Brockville (Islamic Center of Brockville)
mosques.description: Islamic center serving Brockville and the eastern Ontario corridor along Highway 401 between Kingston and Cornwall.
mosques.accessInfo: Also listed at 36 Cambridge Crescent, Brockville, ON K6V 6L8
mosques.notes: Located on Hwy 401 corridor between Kingston and Cornwall. Essential stop for travellers on the Montreal-Toronto route.
